rows.notes: Consensus from gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Clear year header.
Description from gpt-5-mini, which correctly transcribes 'Fee' instead of 'Fe'. Consensus on row_type and no monetary amounts.
Consensus from gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Clear description and amounts.
Amounts are consensus. Description from gemini-flash for correct capitalization of 'Quarters' and period.
Consensus from gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Clear total row indicated by underline.

Selected gemini-flash. The amount '1316.1.3' is embedded directly within the description text and not in the main £/s/d columns on the right. Visual inspection confirms no amounts in dedicated columns. 'Domus' is a clearer reading than 'Domes'.
Selected gemini-flash's approach for embedded amount, correcting 'Fe' to 'Fee'. The amount '133.3.9' is clearly embedded in the description and not in the main £/s/d columns. 'Do' is clear.

Selected gemini-flash's approach. The amount '1528.18.9¾' is embedded in the description and not in the main £/s/d columns. 'Defecit Carl No' matches visual cues better than gpt-5-mini's 'Deficit Cash Novr'.
Selected gemini-flash. The value 2978.3.9¾ is clearly visible in the right columns and matches the arithmetic sum of the preceding three embedded amounts (1316.1.3 + 133.3.9 + 1528.18.9¾).
Selected gemini-flash's approach. The amount '187.5.2' is embedded in the description and not in the main £/s/d columns. 'Domus receipt' is more accurate than 'Domus receipts'.
Selected gemini-flash's approach for embedded amount, correcting 'Fe' to 'Fee'. The amount '798.9.6' is clearly embedded in the description and not in the main £/s/d columns. 'Do' is clear.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirms 985.14.8 in the right-hand columns. This also matches the arithmetic sum of the preceding two entries (187.5.2 + 798.9.6) which were identified as embedded amounts. gpt-5-mini's claim of a faint leading '1' making it '1585' is not supported by visual evidence and leads to an incorrect sum for the current entries.

Selected gpt-5-mini for pence values as gemini-flash's '13' pence is invalid by hard rule. Visual verification confirms '1992 10' and '¾' are clear, but the whole pence digit between 10 and ¾ is highly ambiguous/faint, supporting gpt-5-mini's empty pence_whole.

Row found only by gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirms a faint annotation '1912 14 13' below the final total, poorly aligned and not a formal monetary entry, consistent with gemini-flash's interpretation.
Consensus from gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Clear date header.
Selected gemini-flash for 'row_type' as it's a record of an event, and for description 'allow'd' matching the visible contraction. Both agree on no monetary amounts.
Selected gpt-5-mini for the first initial 'J'. Visual confirmation shows a clear 'J' rather than an 'I'. Decided on 'entry' for row_type as it represents a specific signature/individual.
Consensus on description text, adding a period after 'Fellow' as per visual. Decided on 'entry' for row_type.
Consensus on description. Decided on 'entry' for row_type.
